lines.speaker: Victoria Kebbit Monkfish
lines.text: The sea has been getting quite busy all of a sudden. I surfaced to see what the fuss was about and found that lots of you seem interested in diving down to the sea floor.

lines.speaker: Victoria Kebbit Monkfish
lines.text: I'm offering my services as a guide, for a price. The price in this case, is knowledge!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Interesting... It might be good to add some data about the depth of the sea to my charts.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I dive to the sea floor with you?

lines.speaker: Victoria Kebbit Monkfish
lines.text: I don't think you are practised enough to dive here. I don't want you getting swept away!

lines.speaker: Victoria Kebbit Monkfish
lines.text: You need to be wearing deep sea diving equipment to dive with me!

lines.speaker: Victoria Kebbit Monkfish
lines.text: I want something in return if you're going to dive with me...

lines.speaker: Victoria Kebbit Monkfish
lines.text: I'd like to try making some of your land food. Can you tell me the raw ingredients and tools I need to make an apple pie? Don't worry about water. I have plenty of that.

lines.speaker: Victoria Kebbit Monkfish
lines.text: This puzzle has three answers and you'll need to tell me all of them.

lines.speaker: Answers (any order)
lines.text: : Cooking Apple, Pot of Flour, Pie Dish

lines.speaker: Victoria Kebbit Monkfish
lines.text: I don't think that's right... You should try again.

lines.speaker: Victoria Kebbit Monkfish
lines.text: I'd like to try making some of your land food. Can you tell me the raw ingredients and tools I need to make an apple pie? Don't worry about water. I have plenty of that.

lines.speaker: Victoria Kebbit Monkfish
lines.text: This puzzle has three answers and you'll need to tell me all of them.

lines.speaker: Victoria Kebbit Monkfish
lines.text: There you go. Hope the dive got you everything you needed!
